features.name: ZIM Canvas Engine
features.description: Handles all game rendering and animations using ZIM.js

features.name: React UI Layer
features.description: Manages forms, inputs, authentication, and dashboard UI

features.name: Reusable Component System
features.description: Global UI components like buttons, modals, and cards

features.name: Admin Dashboard
features.description: Role-based admin interface for managing users and data

features.name: User Dashboard
features.description: Personal user area with profile, stats, and settings

features.name: Authentication System
features.description: Login, signup, and session management using JWT or NextAuth

features.name: Game Integration Layer
features.description: Bridge between React UI and ZIM canvas events
